what: Collecting TERN Data Over Time and Space
title: collect_tern_data() — Vectorized Data Collection
text: collect_tern_data() function provides vectorized interface extract values one TERN datasets given location(s) date range. Unlike individual wrapper functions (read_smips(), read_asc(), etc.) return raster objects, collect_tern_data() returns data table extracted point values — ideal analysis workflows.

previous_headings: Collecting TERN Data Over Time and Space
title: collect_tern_data() — Vectorized Data Collection
text: Extract SMIPS soil moisture single location multiple dates: verbose = TRUE, ’ll see: 1. Dataset information table showing collected (name, ID, layers, temporal resolution, spatial resolution, description) 2. Progress messages data downloaded 3. Summary rows columns collected
code: library(nert)  dates <- seq(as.Date("2024-01-01"), as.Date("2024-01-10"), by = "day")  dt <- collect_tern_data(   lon = 138.6,   lat = -34.9,   date_range = dates,   datasets = "SMIPS",   verbose = TRUE )  head(dt)

previous_headings: Collecting TERN Data Over Time and Space
title: collect_tern_data() — Vectorized Data Collection
text: default, collect_tern_data() extracts available variants/depths: SMIPS: 6 soil moisture variants (totalbucket, SMindex, bucket1, bucket2, deepD, runoff) SLGA datasets (AWC, CLY, SND, SLT, BDW, PHC, PHW, NTO): 6 soil depths (0–5 cm 100–200 cm) ensures get comprehensive data without specifying option:
code: # Gets all 6 SMIPS variants + all 6 AWC depths in one call dt <- collect_tern_data(   lon = 138.6,   lat = -34.9,   date_range = "2024-01-15",   datasets = c("SMIPS", "AWC"),   verbose = FALSE  # Hide table for brevity )  names(dt) # [1] "date"              "SMIPS_totalbucket" "SMIPS_SMindex" # [4] "SMIPS_bucket1"     "SMIPS_bucket2"     "SMIPS_deepD" # [7] "SMIPS_runoff"      "AWC_000_005"       "AWC_005_015" # [10] "AWC_015_030"      "AWC_030_060"       "AWC_060_100" # [13] "AWC_100_200"

previous_headings: Collecting TERN Data Over Time and Space
title: collect_tern_data() — Vectorized Data Collection
text: Extract data multiple coordinates (returns one row per location per date): use xy notation data.frame:
code: # Vector notation dt_multi <- collect_tern_data(   lon = c(138.6, 139.5, 140.1),   lat = c(-34.9, -35.2, -34.5),   date_range = c("2024-01-01", "2024-01-05"),   datasets = c("SMIPS", "CANOPY") )  nrow(dt_multi)  # 3 locations × 5 dates = 15 rows ncol(dt_multi)  # date + lon + lat + SMIPS_variants(6) + CANOPY(1) = 11 cols locations <- data.frame(   lon = c(138.6, 139.5, 140.1),   lat = c(-34.9, -35.2, -34.5) )  dt_xy <- collect_tern_data(   xy = locations,   date_range = "2024-01-15",   datasets = c("ASC", "PHENOLOGY") )

previous_headings: Collecting TERN Data Over Time and Space
title: collect_tern_data() — Vectorized Data Collection
text: Extract specific variants depths instead :
code: # Only specific SMIPS collection dt_smi <- collect_tern_data(   lon = 138.6,   lat = -34.9,   date_range = "2024-01-15",   datasets = "SMIPS",   smips_collection = "SMindex"  # Just soil moisture index (0-100%) ) # Returns: date, SMIPS_SMindex  # Only specific depth for SLGA dt_surface <- collect_tern_data(   lon = 138.6,   lat = -34.9,   date_range = "2024-01-15",   datasets = "CLY",   depth = "000_005"  # Top 5 cm only ) # Returns: date, CLY

what: A simple model for grain yield
title: Using nert to augment agricultural analytics with SMIPS data
text: First, model grain yield simple model without taking account soil moisture confounding—, without reference SMIPS data just downloaded. later incorporate SMIPS data see including soil moisture covariate improves nitrogen treatment effect size estimates. use nlme package fit linear mixed-effect model. grain yield Yield_Tha modelled taking Variety, nitrogen application rate Nitrogen_kgNha seeding rate SeedRate_plantsm2 fixed terms, incorporating Site replicate (Rep) structure experiment random effect term. can check confidence intervals effect sizes nitrogen treatments simple model:
code: library(nlme) simple_model <- lme(   fixed = Yield_Tha ~ Variety * Nitrogen_kgNha * SeedRate_plantsm2,   random = ~ 1 | Site / Rep,   data = grain ) simple_model.ints <- intervals(simple_model, which = "fixed")$fixed simple_model.Neffects <- simple_model.ints[paste0("Nitrogen_kgNha", c(30, 60, 90)), ] simple_model.Neffects #>                        lower      est.     upper #> Nitrogen_kgNha30 -0.17355028 0.0392950 0.2521403 #> Nitrogen_kgNha60  0.08045472 0.2933000 0.5061453 #> Nitrogen_kgNha90  0.09779306 0.3106383 0.5234836

what: Augmenting the yield model with soil moisture data
title: Using nert to augment agricultural analytics with SMIPS data
text: Next, augment modelling including SMIPS soil moisture data covariate (perhaps anticipating soil moisture improves yield, might reduce effect nitrogen applied soil due volatilisation). keep things simple, site (associated nitrogen application date) take average SMIPS-reported soil moisture index date nitrogen application 30 days application, store new column called SoilMoisture_avg. can add average soil moisture fixed effect linear mixed-effect model: confidence intervals effect sizes nitrogen application treatments augmented model follows: can use ggplot2 plotting graph confidence intervals simple model versus augmented model, illuminate difference attained include soil moisture confounding term modelling: Nitrogen effect estimates compared simple model SMIPS-augmented model. comparison effect sizes nitrogen treatment, can see ignoring effect soil moisture simple model underestimates direct nitrogen treatment effect. augmented model, contrast, accounts soil moisture potential nitrogen volatilisation may occur higher soil moisture conditions.
code: for (site in sites$Site) {   start_date <- unique(grain[which(grain$Site == site), "NitrogenDate"])[1]   dates <- seq(start_date, start_date + 30, by = "1 day")   smips <- smips_data[which(smips_data$Site == site & smips_data$Date %in% dates), ]   smips_avg <- mean(smips[["smips_smi_perc"]])   grain[which(grain$Site == site), "SoilMoisture_avg"] <- smips_avg } augmented_model <- lme(   fixed = Yield_Tha ~ Variety * Nitrogen_kgNha * SeedRate_plantsm2     + SoilMoisture_avg + SoilMoisture_avg:Nitrogen_kgNha,   random = ~ 1 | Site / Rep,   data = grain ) augmented_model.ints <- intervals(augmented_model, which = "fixed")$fixed augmented_model.Neffects <- augmented_model.ints[paste0("Nitrogen_kgNha", c(30, 60, 90)), ] augmented_model.Neffects #>                        lower      est.     upper #> Nitrogen_kgNha30 -0.03984861 0.2000454 0.4399395 #> Nitrogen_kgNha60  0.31409573 0.5539898 0.7938838 #> Nitrogen_kgNha90  0.33961765 0.5795117 0.8194058 library(ggplot2)  ci <- rbind(   data.frame(simple_model.Neffects, model = "Simple Model"),   data.frame(augmented_model.Neffects, model = "SMIPS-Augmented Model") ) ci$term <- paste0("Nitrogen_kgNha", c(30, 60, 90))  pd <- position_dodge(-0.4) ggplot(ci, aes(x = est., y = term, colour = model)) +   scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +   geom_point(position = pd) +   geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), position = pd, height = 0.2) +   labs(y = "predictor", x = "estimate")

text: hand-written loop shown didactic purposes — makes per-date COG read per-site point extraction explicit. routine use, collect_tern_data() performs operation vectorised across locations, one COG open per (dataset, date, variant) regardless number points. SMindex time series can produced single call: smips_dt data.table one row per (date, location); single extraction call replaces inner terra::extract() loop. example shown eval=FALSE avoid duplicating network traffic already performed loop; output schema identical smips_data apart column name (SMIPS_SMindex rather smips_smi_perc).
code: smips_dt <- collect_tern_data(   xy = data.frame(lon = sites$Longitude, lat = sites$Latitude),   date_range = c(start_date, end_date),   datasets = "SMIPS",   smips_collection = "SMindex",   verbose = FALSE ) head(smips_dt)

what: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
title: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
text: Extract values one TERN datasets given location(s) date range. Returns data.table one row per (date, location) one column per dataset layer.  Static datasets repeated across dates.

title: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
code: collect_tern_data(   date_range,   lon = NULL,   lat = NULL,   xy = NULL,   datasets = NULL,   depth = "all",   stat = "EV",   smips_collection = "all",   api_key = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   na.rm = FALSE )

title: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
text: date_range Date vector character vector dates (e.g.\ seq(.Date("2024-01-01"), .Date("2024-01-31"), = "day")) length-2 vector giving start end dates (e.g.\ c("2024-01-01", "2024-01-31")). lon Longitude(s) (WGS84, EPSG:4326).  Numeric scalar vector (length lat).  Omit using xy notation. lat Latitude(s) (WGS84, EPSG:4326).  Numeric scalar vector (length lon).  Omit using xy notation. xy Optional: data.frame, data.table, matrix coordinate columns named lon/lat x/y.  Takes precedence lon/lat supplied. datasets character vector dataset aliases collect. Default: 20 datasets (SMIPS, ASC, AET, AWC, CLY, SND, SLT, BDW, PHC, PHW, NTO, AVP, PTO, CEC, ECE, DUL, L15, SOILDIV, CANOPY, PHENOLOGY). Use NULL "" datasets. depth SLGA datasets: depth interval (default ""). Options: "000_005", "005_015", "015_030", "030_060", "060_100", "100_200", "" six GlobalSoilMap depths. Ignored non-SLGA datasets. stat SLGA datasets: "EV" (estimate, default) "CI" (confidence interval).  Ignored non-SLGA datasets. smips_collection SMIPS: "" (default, six variants), "totalbucket", "SMindex", "bucket1", "bucket2", "deepD", "runoff".  Ignored non-SMIPS datasets. api_key TERN API key.  Default: get_key(). verbose Logical.  TRUE, print progress messages. na.rm Logical.  TRUE, drop rows dataset columns NA.

title: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
text: data.table columns: date: Date. lon, lat: coordinates (always included; constant single location requested). One column per dataset layer.  See Details naming.

title: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
text: Vectorised extraction.  unique COG required ((dataset, date, variant, depth) tuple), function opens COG calls terra::extract() requested coordinates single SpatVector.  Returning M locations × N dates across K work items therefore costs K COG opens K extract calls, M × K.  Time-series datasets contribute one work item per date; static datasets contribute one work item total (value replicated across date axis output assembly time). Column naming. SMIPS smips_collection = "": six columns named SMIPS_totalbucket, SMIPS_SMindex, SMIPS_bucket1, SMIPS_bucket2, SMIPS_deepD, SMIPS_runoff. SMIPS single collection: one column SMIPS_<collection>. SLGA depth = "": six columns per dataset (e.g.\ AWC_000_005 ... AWC_100_200). SLGA single depth: one column named dataset alias. AET: one column AET. ASC: one column ASC (character soil-order class). CANOPY, SOILDIV, PHENOLOGY: one column named alias. Failure handling.  work item's COG fetch extract fails, corresponding column(s) remain NA affected rows cli::cli_warn() identifies dataset/date/error.  output schema (column count names) fixed planning time invariant per-COG failure.

title: Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space — collect_tern_data
code: if (FALSE) { # interactive() # Single location, single dataset dates <- seq(as.Date("2024-01-01"), as.Date("2024-01-05"), by = "day") d_t <- collect_tern_data(   date_range = dates,   lon = 138.6,   lat = -34.9,   datasets = c("SMIPS", "CLY") ) head(d_t)  # Multiple locations (vectorised across points within each COG) d_t_multi <- collect_tern_data(   lon = c(138.6, 139.5),   lat = c(-34.9, -35.5),   date_range = dates,   datasets = c("SMIPS", "CANOPY") )  # xy data.frame notation xy <- data.frame(lon = c(138.6, 139.5), lat = c(-34.9, -35.5)) d_t_xy <- collect_tern_data(   xy = xy,   date_range = dates,   datasets = "CLY" ) }

what: Read CMRSET Actual Evapotranspiration Data from TERN — read_aet
title: Read CMRSET Actual Evapotranspiration Data from TERN — read_aet
text: Wrapper around read_tern() retrieving CMRSET actual evapotranspiration data (v2.2) TERN Data Portal. dataset provides monthly estimates actual ET (mm/month) 30 m resolution May 1987 onwards, using CSIRO MODIS Reflectance-based Scaling EvapoTranspiration (CMRSET) algorithm combines potential evapotranspiration data Bureau Meteorology together satellite image data provided MODIS, VIIRS, Landsat Sentinel-2.

Required. collection One "ETa" (actual evapotranspiration mm/month, default) "pixel_qa" (quality assurance attributes). api_key character string containing TERN API key. Defaults automatic detection .Renviron .Rprofile.  See get_key() setup. max_tries Maximum number download retries error raised. code: if (FALSE) { # interactive() # Actual evapotranspiration (ETa) for June 2023 (mm/month) r_eta <- read_aet("2023-06-01") autoplot(r_eta)  # January 2023 ET r_jan <- read_aet("2023-01-01")  # Quality assurance flags for June 2023 r_qa <- read_aet("2023-06-01", collection = "pixel_qa")  # ET from May 1987 (earliest available) r_early <- read_aet("1987-05-01")  # Current/recent ET (within last month) r_recent <- read_aet(Sys.Date()) }

title: Read Land Surface Phenology from TERN — read_phenology
text: Wrapper around read_tern() retrieving Australian land surface phenology dataset (v1.0) TERN Data Portal. data comprises phenology metrics two growing seasons per year 2003 2018 (inclusive), estimated 500m X 500m spatial resolution across Australia using thresholded MODIS Enhanced Vegetation Index (EVI) imagery.

text: year integer year (2003–2018). season Season number: 1 (default) 2. collection Phenology metric abbreviation.  One "SGS" (default), "PGS", "EGS", "LGS", "EVI1", "EVI2", "EVIP", "EVII", "SGS_month", "PGS_month" "EGS_month". api_key character string containing TERN API key. Defaults automatic detection .Renviron .Rprofile.  See get_key() setup. max_tries Maximum number download retries error raised. Default=NULL, case maximum retry number resolved option nert.max_tries option exists. (Defaults 3 retries nert.max_tries set.) initial_delay Initial retry delay seconds (doubles attempt). title: Read Land Surface Phenology from TERN — read_phenology
text: Eleven phenological metrics available via collection argument: "SGS" Start Growing Season (default). number -150 345 indicating start growing season (negative numbers meaning prior year). "PGS" Peak Growing Season. number 9 361 indicating day year peak growing season. "EGS" End Growing Season. number 25 519 indicating day year marks end growing season, numbers 365 (366 leap years) meaning following year. "LGS" Length Growing Season, measured days. "EVI1" Minimum EVI peak. unitless index 0 10000 (.e., scaled 10000) minimum value Enhanced Vegetation Index peak growing season. "EVI2" Minimum EVI peak. unitless index 0 10000 (.e., scaled 10000) minimum value Enhanced Vegetation Index peak growing season. "EVIP" Peak EVI. unitless index 0 10000 (.e., scaled 10000) value Enhanced Vegetation Index peak growing season. "EVII" Integral EVI across season. calculated integral Enhanced Vegetation Index (including factor 10000 scaling) growing season cycle curve. "SGS_month" Start growing season month. number 1 12, indicating month start growing season (.e., "SGS" metric reprocessed monthly time resolution). "PGS_month" Peak growing season month. number 1 12, indicating month peak growing season (.e., "PGS" metric reprocessed monthly time resolution). "EGS_month" End growing season month. number 1 12, indicating month end growing season (.e., "EGS" metric reprocessed monthly time resolution).

title: Read SMIPS Soil Moisture Data from TERN — read_smips
text: Wrapper around read_tern() retrieving SMIPS v1.0 daily soil moisture data TERN Data Portal. SMIPS provides soil moisture estimates roughly 1km X 1km spatial resolution across Australia, 1st January 2015 onward (updated approximately daily TERN server).

title: Read SMIPS Soil Moisture Data from TERN — read_smips
text: date day download (Date character, e.g. "2024-01-15" .Date("2024-01-15")). collection SMIPS collection variant (default "totalbucket"). Options: "totalbucket" Soil moisture 0-90cm two-bucket store (mm). estimate volumetric soil moisture complete 0-90cm SMIPS two-bucket soil moisture store. "SMindex" Soil moisture index, 0-1. unitless index 0.0 1.0, approximating full complete SMIPS 0-90cm soil moisture two-bucket store . "bucket1" Soil moisture upper 0-10cm bucket (mm). estimate volumetric soil moisture upper 0-10cm soil bucket. "bucket2" Soil moisture lower 10-90cm bucket (mm). estimate volumetric soil moisture lower 10-90cm soil bucket. "deepD" Drainage two buckets (mm). estimate drainage top 0-1cm soil bucket lower 10-90cm bucket. "runoff" Runoff/overtopping moisture loss (mm). estimate moisture lost top 0-10cm bucket due runoff overtopping. api_key character string containing TERN API key. Defaults automatic detection .Renviron .Rprofile.  See get_key() setup. max_tries Maximum number download retries error raised. Default=NULL, case maximum retry number resolved option nert.max_tries option exists. (Defaults 3 retries nert.max_tries set.) initial_delay Initial retry delay seconds (doubles attempt). Default=NULL, case initial delay resolved option nert.initial_delay option exists. (Defaults 1 second initial delay nert.initial_delay set.)

title: Read Soil Beta Diversity from TERN — read_soil_diversity
text: Wrapper around read_tern() retrieving v1.0 datasets soil bacteria soil fungi Beta Diversity TERN Data Portal. Beta Diversity datasets constructed using Digital Soil Mapping techniques together Biome Australia Soil Environments (BASE) DNA sequences, provide Non-metric MultiDimensional Scaling (NMDS) axes soil bacteria fungi 90m X 90m spatial resolution across Australia.

See Dataset aliases section complete table supported aliases. ... Dataset-specific arguments — date, collection, etc.  See relevant section dataset. api_key character string containing TERN API key. Defaults automatic detection .Renviron .Rprofile.  See get_key() setup. max_tries Maximum number download retries error raised. Default=NULL, case maximum retry number resolved option nert.max_tries option exists. (Defaults 3 retries nert.max_tries set.) initial_delay Initial retry delay seconds (doubles attempt). title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: date Required. single day query, e.g. "2024-01-15" .Date("2024-01-15").  character Date classes accepted. collection One "totalbucket" (default), "SMindex", "bucket1", "bucket2", "deepD", "runoff". Data availability: 2005-01-01 today. (Updated regularly.)

title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: date Required. month query, e.g. "2023-06-01" .Date("2023-06-01").  character Date classes accepted.  value snapped first month. collection One "ETa" (primary AET band mm/month, default) "pixel_qa" (quality assurance attributes). Data availability: 1987-05-01 onward, monthly.

title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: 14 SLGA (Soil Landscape Grid Australia) soil attributes available static 90 m products, six standard depth layers three statistics: depth One "000_005" (default), "005_015", "015_030", "030_060", "060_100", "100_200" (cm). collection One "EV" (estimated value, default), "05" (lower percentile limit 95% confidence interval) "95" (upper percentile limit confidence interval). Supported attributes (use dataset_id alias): "AWC" Available Water Capacity (percent) "CLY" Clay content (percent) "SND" Sand content (percent) "SLT" Silt content (percent) "BDW" Bulk Density whole earth (g/cm3) "PHC" pH (CaCl2) "PHW" pH (water) "NTO" Total Nitrogen (percent) "AVP" Available Phosphorus (mg/kg) "PTO" Total Phosphorus (percent) "CEC" Cation Exchange Capacity (meq/100g) "ECE" Effective Cation Exchange Capacity (meq/100g) "DUL" Drained Upper Limit volumetric water content (percent) "L15" 15 Bar Lower Limit volumetric water content (percent)

title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: collection One "Bacteria" (default) "Fungi". axis NMDS axis: 1 (default), 2, 3.

title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: Single static 30 m X 30 m best-pick canopy height model composite, OzTreeMap project. function arguments required.

title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: year Required. integer year (2003–2018). season Season number: 1 (default) 2. collection Phenology metric — one "SGS" (Start Growing Season, default), "PGS" (Peak Growing Season), "EGS" (End Growing Season), "LGS" (Length Growing Season), "EVI1" (Minimum EVI peak), "EVI2" (Minimum EVI peak), "EVIP" (EVI Peak Growing Season), "EVII" (Integral EVI growing season curve), "SGS_month" (Start Growing Season, monthly resolution), "PGS_month" (Peak Growing Season, monthly resolution), "EGS_month" (End Growing Season, monthly resolution).

title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: following datasets tracked TERN catalogue accessed via COG HTTP range requests: TERN/0997cb3c — Seasonal Fractional Cover (Landsat) TERN/fe9d86e1 — Seasonal Ground Cover (Landsat) Datasets integration level L2 higher (e.g.\ AusEFlux via THREDDS/OPeNDAP, GEE-based products, site-level API streams) read via simple COG HTTP range requests outside current scope nert.

title: Read TERN COG Datasets — read_tern
text: nert reads two package-level options every call.  set package defaults load time may overridden globally (e.g.\ .Rprofile) without changing individual call: nert.max_tries Default maximum number download retries.  Default 3L. nert.initial_delay Default initial retry delay seconds (doubles attempt).  Default 1L. Per-call values supplied via max_tries initial_delay arguments always override option.  Example:
code: options(nert.max_tries = 5L, nert.initial_delay = 2L)

title: nert 1.1.0
text: Updated version, fixing number issues TERN dataset retrieval. read_smips() now tests correct day validating date requested raster. read_phenology() now provides access phenology datasets available TERN Data Portal, including monthly SGS/PGS/EGS. read_slga() provides access additional six datasets (CEC,ECE, AVP,PTO,DUL,L15), also allows user pull 05 95 percentile limits 95% confidence interval. read_asc() now provides access data confusion index rasters using consistent interface rest read_*() functions. Documentation functions TERN datasets reviewed improved.

title: nert 1.0.0
text: First stable release. package matured 0.0.x development line presented complete user-facing surface — 11 exports covering 14 TERN datasets via unified read_tern() dispatcher batch primitive collect_tern_data() — along audit-driven polish accumulated pre-CRAN review.

title: nert 1.0.0
text: read_smips() argument day renamed date, matching unified argument naming used across read_*() functions. Existing code calling read_smips(day = ...) fail “unused argument” error; replace day = date =. rename introduced read_smips() reintroduced thin wrapper read_tern("SMIPS", ...) (PR #26) surfaced NEWS.md time; 1.0.0 entry corrects omission per #35.

title: nert 1.0.0
text: Retry behaviour now configurable via package options nert.max_tries (default 3L) nert.initial_delay (default 1L, seconds). Set globally , e.g., options(nert.max_tries = 5L, nert.initial_delay = 2L) .Rprofile apply across every read_*() collect_tern_data() call. Closes #20.

title: nert 1.0.0
text: collect_tern_data() now vectorised across locations. earlier implementation looped (location, dataset, date) tuples called read_tern() + terra::extract() per single point, redownloading Cloud Optimised GeoTIFF (COG) per location. refactored version plans list work items (one item per unique COG), opens COG via /vsicurl/, calls terra::extract() coordinates passed single SpatVector. M locations work-item budget K, function now performs K reads K extracts rather M × K .

title: nert 1.0.0
text: collect_tern_data() now predeclares every output column NA planning time. per-COG fetch failure leaves affected column NA without removing result, column count schema invariant network failure (non-SLGA static datasets longer disappear result transient fetch error). collect_tern_data() now always emits lon lat columns, including single-location calls (previously omitted one location passed), standardising output schema across call shapes. .check_collection_agreement() (SMIPS date validator) now uses documented 2015-11-20 lower bound (2005) emits grammatical, dated error messages. operator-precedence bug caused non-totalbucket collections bypass lower-bound check fixed. read_asc(confusion_index = NULL) previously silently took Confusion-Index branch via isFALSE(NULL) == FALSE. argument now strictly required single non-NA logical. .read_cog(max_tries = 0L) previously returned NULL silently loop body never executed; now errors clear message. Non-integer-coercible max_tries (e.g. "two") also rejected. .tern_dispatch_id() now rejects vector input rather silently collapsing first element. error message points users collect_tern_data() multi-dataset calls. read_phenology() missing year now surfaces documented 2003–2018 message rather R’s generic missing-argument message (year defaults NULL). validator also rejects non-integer values (e.g. 2018.5) vector years. Two vignette runnability defects fixed: agricultural vignette previously called read_smips(day = ...) (now date = ...) contained injected collect_tern_data() section whose output schema clobbered chunk--chunk smips_data variable used later analytics; replaced corrected, eval=FALSE showcase placed analytics. intro vignette’s two remaining day = ... calls also corrected. Prose corrections vignettes: Yield_tha → Yield_Tha (matches data column name); Ecological → Ecosystem (TERN’s actual expansion); vaporisation → volatilisation (consistent earlier paragraph chemistry); visualalising → visualising; SMindex scale described “0–100” rather “0–1” match COG. grain Rd description corrected: Variety factor 8 levels (matches levels(grain$Variety)), 10.

title: nert 1.0.0
text: portal.tern.org.au/metadata/TERN/<UUID> Rd references migrated geonetwork.tern.org.au/... URLs; several portal URLs returned HTTP 404 2026-05, GeoNetwork resolves UUIDs. dead www.clw.csiro.au/aclep/... URL replaced active esoil.io/TERNLandscapes/... equivalent. urlchecker::url_check() now clean.

title: nert 1.0.0
text: max_tries initial_delay arguments public read functions (read_tern(), read_aet(), read_asc(), read_canopy_height(), read_phenology(), read_slga(), read_smips(), read_soil_diversity()) now default NULL. NULL, values resolved call time getOption("nert.max_tries") getOption("nert.initial_delay"). non-breaking: existing user code passes explicit integers (e.g., read_tern("CANOPY", max_tries = 5L)) continues work unchanged still overrides option. New internal helper .init_nert_options() (R/zzz.R) populates package options .onLoad(). Pattern adapted rOpenSci read.abares package. sf removed Imports (zero references package code; legacy scaffolding never-delivered helper). nlme demoted Imports Suggests; used agricultural vignette, already declares %\VignetteDepends{nlme}. @import nlme directive pulled namespace without using removed. tests/testthat/test-validation.R substantially expanded test-collect_tern_data.R cover validation paths work-item planner (37 + 9 deterministic offline tests). Test coverage uplift. Eight new/expanded offline test files (test-url-snapshots.R, test-read_aet.R, test-read_slga.R, test-read_soil_diversity.R, test-read_canopy_height.R, test-read_phenology.R, test-collect_tern_data_mocked.R, test-read_asc.R) lift package coverage ~58% ~83%, every read_*() reader 100%. Mocking done internal .read_cog() binding via testthat::local_mocked_bindings(); test-url-snapshots.R pins every URL template via expect_snapshot(). Bumped testthat (>= 3.0.0) -> testthat (>= 3.2.0) Suggests local_mocked_bindings() support.

title: nert 0.0.4
text: AET URL prefix corrected /landscapes/aet/v2_2/ /model-derived/aet/v2_2/ .make_aet_url(). TERN’s bucket reorganisation moved CMRSET v2.2 model-derived classification (CMRSET CSIRO-modelled output, satellite landscape product); legacy path returns 301 → 401 GDAL /vsicurl/ propagate apikey:KEY@host userinfo across redirect, surfacing R [rast] file exist. Verified live TERN COG listing. read_slga() now applies toupper() attribute argument rlang::arg_match() (rather inside ), fixing ! 'arg' must symbol, call. error reported running help example. .TERN_ALIASES casing bug .tern_dispatch_id() resolved (incomplete rename surfaced PR #30; live name .tern_aliases). collect_tern_data() now correctly expands depth = "" eight SLGA datasets (AWC, CLY, SND, SLT, BDW, PHC, PHW, NTO) six GlobalSoilMap depth intervals, producing one column per (dataset, depth) named e.g. AWC_000_005. Previously literal string "" passed straight .read_tern_slga() rejected via rlang::arg_match(); resulting error silently swallowed eight SLGA datasets disappeared result. Returning 14 datasets SLGA depths now yields 60 columns (1 date + 6 SMIPS variants + ASC + AET + 8 SLGA x 6 depths + SOILDIV + CANOPY + PHENOLOGY). collect_tern_data() now surfaces fetch errors via cli::cli_warn() instead silently dropping failed dataset’s column. Failed cells contain NA; warning identifies dataset, date (applicable), underlying error message. Pairs SLGA fix ensure column count result matches verbose datasets-table announcement.

title: nert 0.0.4
text: Removed unused .create_sf() helper tests. Originally added scaffolding extract_aet() function never delivered. Removed unused .check_not_example_api_key() helper test. withr added Suggests test fixtures. tests/testthat/setup.R loads TERN_API_KEY ~/.Renviron network-dependent tests run R CMD check user key configured locally. CI continues skip network tests repository secret configured — intentional behaviour. roxyglobals moodymudskipper/devtag integrated @autoglobal @dev roxygen tag support; pkgdown reference index now builds without internal-helper warnings. Authors@R: Max Moldovan ORCID added.

title: nert 0.0.3.9000
text: Addition collect_tern_data() batch extraction TERN datasets one locations date range. Returns data.table one row per date per location. Supports 14 datasets, multi-location coordinate input (lon/lat vectors data.frame), column expansion multi-layer products (SLGA depths, SMIPS variants). Addition collect_tern_data vignette worked examples.

title: nert 0.0.2.9000
text: Unified read_tern() dispatcher supporting 14 TERN COG datasets via short aliases: SMIPS, ASC, AET, 8 SLGA soil attributes (AWC, CLY, SND, SLT, BDW, PHC, PHW, NTO), Soil Beta Diversity, Canopy Height, Land Surface Phenology. Convenience wrappers: read_slga(), read_soil_diversity(), read_canopy_height(), read_phenology().

title: nert 0.0.1.9000
text: Addition read_aet() extract_aet() read Actual Evapotranspiration (AET) CMRSET data TERN. See https://portal.tern.org.au/metadata/TERN/9fefa68b-dbed-4c20-88db-a9429fb4ba97 data. Addition get_asc() get Australian Soil Classification data confusion index values pattern. See https://www.tern.org.au/news/news-australian-soil-classification-map/ data.
